compounds.frequency: 2x daily (1 IU morning before fasted cardio, 1 IU at night before bed)

benefits.description: Sleep has definitely improved on HGH
Fat loss has definitely improved on HGH

side_effects.description: No side effects experienced so far (insulin resistance, water retention, moon face, carpal tunnel, ankle swelling noted as known risks but not personally experienced)

protocol_notes: Age 43. Previously tried CJC/IPA and didn't notice much. Skipped Tesa/IPA combo and went straight to HGH. Uses carb cycling - carb heavy on workout days, lower carb on rest days. Taking berberine, no blood sugar spikes noted. Just started lean bulk phase. Recommends Klow as add-on for recovery.
